title: Wire Graphify enrichment into brief, CLI, MCP, and dashboard
description: Wire the Graphify enrichment from task-graph-core into all surfacing layers: brief output (CLI text), MCP get_brief tool, and the dashboard Brief page. Each layer adds related files, concepts, and impact hints to the existing brief display — no new commands or pages, just richer existing output.
acceptance: CLI: `waystation brief --task <id>` output includes '## Related files' (with file paths and relationship type), '## Concepts' (topic summaries), and '## Impact hints' (dependency warnings) sections when graph data is available.
MCP: get_brief tool returns the enriched Brief interface with relatedFiles, concepts, impactHints arrays.
Dashboard: Brief page shows related files, concepts, and impact hints in labeled sections (matching the existing mockup design style).
All layers degrade gracefully when graph data is absent — sections are simply omitted.
bun:test: CLI integration test renders brief with graph data; dashboard API returns enriched brief; MCP tool returns enriched brief.
typecheck, biome check, and waystation validate all clean.
notes: Surfacing pattern: brief.ts is the single authority that returns the enriched Brief. CLI, MCP, and dashboard just call buildBrief() — they don't need to know about graph. The renderBrief() function in brief.ts adds the new sections. Dashboard Brief page already has a sectioned design — add Related files, Concepts, and Impact hints sections. Keep the display compact: max 10 related files, 5 concepts, 5 impact hints in the UI.
